name: True Love
short_description: If you are looking for the True Love... Here you go xd
detailed_description:
This game created out of pure sadness. I have no friends but I need to share my thoughts. There are 7 Knights (except the first one) you need to interact (you can interact with the first one too don't worry). 1 crane, 1 construction truck, 1 regular truck, 1 sports car, 1 mixer, 1 wheel loader, 1 backhoe, 12 drivable car. That's all. I put cars the drivable cars around the map.

My thoughts are written in those 7 knights but every knight protected by a creature that will chase you down. If they get you you will die and start from begining.
There is no autosave or quick save. You can always ALT+F4 and start over if needed.

I put the knights' locations on the steam photos.

Gameplay is very simple you just need to find the objects that I put around the map while escaping from the things that will chase you down.

Thanks for your support

YOU WILL BE REMEMBERED!!!

This game is a third person puzzle game. You need to find the knights to end the game. You can interact with knights or other objects in the map. There are dozen car that you can drive.
